## Type of change

- [ ] 🐛 Bug fix (non-breaking change which fixes an issue)
- [ ] ✨ New feature (non-breaking change which adds functionality)
- [ ] 💥 Breaking change (fix or feature that would cause existing functionality to not work as expected)
- [ ] 📚 Documentation update
- [ ] 🎨 Refactor / cleanup

## Checklist

- [ ] My code follows the project's TypeScript strict-mode conventions.
- [ ] I have **not** added any new runtime dependencies (this is a zero-dependency library).
- [ ] I added JSDoc comments to any newly exported API.
- [ ] I updated `examples/` or `docs/` where relevant.
- [ ] I updated `CHANGELOG.md` under `[Unreleased]`.
- [ ] My commits follow [Conventional Commits](https://www.conventionalcommits.org/).
